title: Input
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Input wrapper composed from the local Base UI Input primitive and shadcn class tokens.

registry.reason: shadcn Input composes the local Base UI Input primitive.
shadcn Input uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native helper.
Provided by the local Base UI Input dependency for Effect Schema options.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin React primitive is replaced by the local Foldkit Base UI Input implementation.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
